svg.text: factory native (sample tool emits 27 with trailing 0x00 — non-canonical, corrupts scene transitions); color-zoned by field group, verified offsets solid, inferred faded

g.text: 6 bytes change when sample tool assigns a pad — the rest hold defaults.
offsets and size verified by diffing real backups + factory_default.pak. previous tables (and earlier versions of this doc) said 27 bytes — see protocol.md §7.0 erratum.
method: byte-diff a blank pad against a single sample-tool assignment, then identity-check decoded values against the device ui.
